_comment: SUPERSEDED — replaced by apps/web/eslint.config.mjs (ESLint 10 flat config). Could not be deleted from the automation session (mount rejected rm with 'Operation not permitted'); stubbed to an empty object instead. ESLint 10 with flat config ignores .eslintrc.* entirely once eslint.config.* exists, so this is inert. Please delete manually: rm .eslintrc.cjs apps/web/.eslintrc.json
